name: nf-core-module-dev
description: Agents and skills for creating, testing, and documenting Nextflow nf-core modules

interface.shortDescription: Create, test, and document nf-core Nextflow modules
interface.longDescription: Specialist workflows for nf-core module development: main.nf and environment.yml authoring, nf-test creation and snapshot verification, and meta.yml documentation and linting.
defaultPrompt: Create an nf-core module for bwa mem2 mem
Write nf-tests and meta.yml for this nf-core module
